query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_hands,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' AND lesson IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS test_hands_null_lesson,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson NOT LIKE '%TEST%' OR lesson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS potentially_real,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tagged_test
FROM hands;

  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' AND lesson IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS test_hands_null_lesson,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson NOT LIKE '%TEST%' OR lesson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS potentially_real,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tagged_test
FROM hands;
